author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Men-s Order Convention 1987
content:
MEN'S ORDER CONVENTION 1987

QUESTIONS AND ANSWERS
CONTENTS
1The wild goose in India
4Right Livelihood and its four main objectives
6Collecting information about centres via surveys/questionnairres
7The anagarika ceremony
8Bhante's photographs on shrines?
Consecration of rupas etc.
10Form and content in art
12The Order and other spiritual traditions
13'Accidentally' Going for Refuge to another teacher/tradition
16The importance of attending Order Conventions
16Progress and maturity in the Women's wing of the Order
18Concern over 'negative competitiveness' in the men's wing of the Order
19Bhante's reflections on the 1987 Order Conventions
21The phases of expression of Bhante's teachings
22The natural death of the question and answer session
22Bhante's literary ideas
